Test_Objective: Verify authenticated user can access Home screen
Precondition: User is logged in with valid credentials
Steps:
1. Log in with valid credentials
2. Observe post-login destination
Expected_Result: Home screen displayed successfully

Test_Objective: Verify unauthenticated user cannot access Home screen
Precondition: User is not logged in
Steps:
1. Launch app without logging in
2. Attempt to access Home screen
Expected_Result: Redirected to Login screen

Test_Objective: Verify 401 API response redirects to Login
Precondition: User is on Home screen; session expired mid-session
Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to Home
2. Simulate API returning 401 (expire session)
3. Observe navigation
Expected_Result: Redirected to Login screen

Test_Objective: Verify 403 API response redirects to Access Denied
Precondition: User is on Home screen; account lacks permissions
Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to Home
2. Simulate API returning 403
3. Observe navigation
Expected_Result: Redirected to Access Denied screen

Test_Objective: Verify Home screen is destination after successful login
Precondition: User on Login screen with valid credentials
Steps:
1. Open app; observe Login screen
2. Enter valid credentials
3. Tap Login button
4. Observe navigation destination
Expected_Result: Home screen displayed; Login screen removed from back stack

Sub_Sub_Category: From another main screen via SAA 2025 tab
Test_Objective: Verify user can return to Home via SAA 2025 NavBar tab
Precondition: User is authenticated; currently on Awards or Kudos or Profile screen
Steps:
1. Log in and navigate to another main screen (e.g. Awards)
2. Tap SAA 2025 tab in bottom nav bar
3. Observe navigation
Expected_Result: Home screen displayed; SAA 2025 tab highlighted

Test_Objective: Verify screen-wide layout: key sections, fixed elements, and sub-element presence
Precondition: User is logged in; awards API returns data; Kudos feature enabled; unread notifications > 0
Test_Data: Valid auth session; award data available
Steps:
1. Log in and land on Home screen
2. Observe overall layout
3. Scroll through content area
4. Observe fixed elements (header + FAB + nav bar)
Expected_Result: Header fixed at top (logo + language switcher + search icon + bell icon with badge dot); Hero section visible: ROOT FURTHER logo + countdown units (DAYS/HOURS/MINUTES) + event date/venue/livestream text + ABOUT AWARD button + ABOUT KUDOS button; Theme description paragraph visible; Awards section visible: section header + horizontally scrollable card list with thumbnail + award name + truncated description + Chi tiết link per card; Kudos section visible: header + banner image + ĐIỂM MỚI CỦA SAA 2025 badge + description + Chi tiết button; FAB pill fixed bottom-right: pencil icon + / + S/Kudos icon; Bottom NavBar fixed: SAA 2025 (active/gold) + Awards + Kudos + Profile

Test_Objective: Verify Awards section displays loading state while API is in progress
Precondition: User is logged in; awards API response is delayed
Steps:
1. Log in
2. Observe Awards section before API completes
Expected_Result: Awards section shows loading indicator

Test_Objective: Verify Awards section displays empty state when API returns no data
Precondition: User is logged in; awards API returns empty list
Steps:
1. Log in with awards API returning no data
2. Scroll to Awards section
3. Observe display
Expected_Result: Awards empty state UI displayed; no card items shown

Test_Objective: Verify Awards section displays error state when API call fails
Precondition: User is logged in; awards API returns error
Steps:
1. Log in with awards API failing
2. Scroll to Awards section
3. Observe display
Expected_Result: Awards error state UI displayed; Retry button visible

Test_Objective: Verify Kudos section is hidden entirely when feature is unavailable
Precondition: User is logged in; isKudosAvailable = false
Steps:
1. Log in with Kudos feature disabled
2. Scroll through content area
3. Observe presence of Kudos section
Expected_Result: Kudos section (mms_5_kudos) not displayed; no disabled placeholder shown

Test_Objective: Verify notification badge dot displayed when unread > 0, hidden when = 0
Precondition: User is logged in
Steps:
1. Log in with unread notifications > 0
2. Observe Bell icon
3. Mark all notifications read (unread = 0)
4. Observe Bell icon again
Expected_Result: With unread > 0: red badge dot visible on Bell icon; With unread = 0: badge dot not visible

Test_Objective: Verify countdown updates every second toward 26/12/2025
Precondition: User is on Home screen; current date/time is before 26/12/2025 00:00:00 GMT+7
Test_Data: Device clock set to pre-event date
Steps:
1. Log in and land on Home screen
2. Observe DAYS/HOURS/MINUTES countdown units
3. Wait 3 seconds and observe again
Expected_Result: Countdown values update every 1 second; DAYS/HOURS/MINUTES reflect remaining time to 26/12/2025

Test_Objective: Verify Coming soon label visible before event date and hidden after
Precondition: User is on Home screen
Test_Data: Device clock set to pre-event and post-event dates
Steps:
1. Set device date to before 26/12/2025
2. Log in and observe Home screen hero section
3. Set device date to after 26/12/2025
4. Observe hero section again
Expected_Result: Before 26/12/2025: Coming soon label visible; After 26/12/2025: Coming soon label hidden

Test_Objective: Verify Retry button re-triggers API fetch after Awards API failure
Precondition: User is on Home screen; Awards shows error state
Test_Data: API returns 500 then succeeds on retry
Steps:
1. Log in with awards API failing
2. Confirm Awards error state with Retry button
3. Tap Retry button
4. Observe Awards section after retry (API now succeeds)
Expected_Result: After retry: awards data loads successfully; award cards displayed

Test_Objective: Verify tapping Chi tiết on an award card navigates to that award's detail screen
Precondition: User is on Home screen; awards API returns ≥1 card
Steps:
1. Log in and land on Home screen
2. Scroll to Awards section
3. Tap Chi tiết link on any award card
Expected_Result: Award Detail screen for the selected award category displayed

Test_Objective: Verify award card list scrolls horizontally
Precondition: User is on Home screen; API returns multiple award cards
Steps:
1. Log in and land on Home screen
2. Scroll to Awards section
3. Swipe left on award card list
4. Swipe right on award card list
Expected_Result: Award card list scrolls left and right; cards fully revealed
